dqn_v2_2022_2025.label: DQN+PER v2 — 2022–2025 · 3 M steps
dqn_v2_2022_2025.description: Production policy. DQN with Prioritized Experience Replay trained on 4 seasons (2022–2025), 3 M timesteps. Exposes raw Q-values for each action — directly interpretable unlike a stochastic PPO policy.

ppo_v1_2022_2026.label: PPO v1 — 2022–2026 · 3 M steps
ppo_v1_2022_2026.description: Baseline policy. PPO trained on 5 seasons (2022–2026), 3 M timesteps, 256×128 MLP. Kept for side-by-side comparison with DQN+PER.
